headline: Emerald Global Water Fund II reaches €100 Million
summary: Emerald Global Water Fund II reaches €100million with addition of Temasek and Grundfos Foundation Helge Daebel, Parter and Head of Water at Emerald Emerald is a globally recognized venture capital firm, founded in 2000, that manages and advises assets of over €1 billion from its offices in Zurich, Toronto and Singapore.
